---
id: readiness-probe
title: "Kubernetes readiness probe"
description: "Returns UP if the application is ready to serve traffic. Used by Kubernetes to control load-balancer routing."

  path={"/actuator/health/readiness"}

Returns UP if the application is ready to serve traffic. Used by Kubernetes to control load-balancer routing.
